features.title: Deflect
features.description: Use this heroic action *after* rolling an agility defense roll. Increase your block to 5 for that attack.

features.title: Team Combat
features.description: Your initiative is treated as being equal to the initiative of the ally with the next highest initiative.

features.title: Skill Versatility
features.description: Gain 3 expertise training.

features.title: Heroism
features.description: At the start of combat, if all of your heroic actions are spent, regain a heroic action. Requires level 5+.

features.title: Tactics
features.description: When you use a major action, an adjacent ally can immediately use a heroic action.

features.title: Adaptability
features.description: Reroll action checks when the roll on the dice is equal to your training in that action check. For example, if you have 3 training in grappling and you roll a 2, you may reroll.

features.title: Battle Lore
features.description: Make an intelligence vs. intelligence attack with a weapon. Requires high elf or half elf.

features.title: Woodland Lore
features.description: Make an initiative vs. initiative attack with a weapon. Requires wood elf.

features.title: Woodland Tactics
features.description: Gain 2 block when not using a shield when fighting in a woodland environment. If you are using a shield, increase the provided block by 1. Requires wood elf.

features.title: Swift (Elf)
features.description: Increase your major movement speed by 1. Requires level 7+ if not wood elf.

features.title: Arcane Lore
features.description: Acquire 2 mystic spells and gain 2 mana. Lose 1 skill. Requires gray elf or high elf.

features.title: Wild Lore
features.description: Acquire 2 nature spells and gain 2 mana. Lose 1 skill. Requires wood elf.

features.title: Essential Power
features.description: Gain 3 mana. Requires high elf or grey elf.

features.title: World Knowledge
features.description: Gain expertise in three different actions.

features.title: Of The World
features.description: Gain expertise in three different actions. Requires half elf.

features.title: Ancient Mending
features.description: Provide 1d20 healing to an adjacent target that is not yourself. Requires grey elf, half elf, or high elf and willpower 3+.

features.title: Persistence
features.description: Make a charge attack without drawing opportunity.

features.title: Pummel
features.description: Make a willpower vs. willpower attack that does 1d4 + willpower damage that ignores damage reduction.

features.title: Life of the underground
features.description: Gain 1 toughness.

features.title: Mining Dwarf
features.description: Gain 1 willpower.

features.title: Rune Lore (Dwarf)
features.description: Acquire 2 rune spells and gain 2 mana. Lose 1 strength.

features.title: Rune Power (Dwarf)
features.description: Gain 3 mana.

features.title: Spell Ward
features.description: When hit by a spell but before the damage is rolled, spend a heroic action to halve the damage.

features.title: Master Craftsmen
features.description: When purchasing an artisan or mastercrafted item, spend 1d20 days crafting it instead. The total cost is reduced by 100 for artisan items and 500 for mastercrafted items.

features.title: Unseen
features.description: Make an attack with advantage.

features.title: Dodge and weave
features.description: Make a major move without drawing an opportunity attack.

features.title: Hamstring
features.description: Make an agility vs. agility attack against a creature that does damage equal to your strength that cannot be ignored. If the attack hits, that creature cannot take major actions until the beginning of the next round.

features.title: Woodland Roots
features.description: Acquire 2 nature spells and gain 2 mana. Lose 1 agility.

features.title: Woodland Power
features.description: Gain 3 mana.

features.title: Nimble Escape
features.description: You may move through creatures that are larger than you.

features.title: Halfling Luck
features.description: When you fail an attack roll, defense roll, or expertise check, you may roll again and gain advantage to the new roll.

features.title: Master cook
features.description: Spend 3 coins to purchase from a market and provide a meal for the entire party. Double the healing everyone receives from resting that day.

features.title: Dodge
features.description: Use this heroic action when being attacked. The attacker must use their intelligence for the attack roll instead of their skill.

features.title: Rune Lore (Gnome)
features.description: Acquire 2 rune spells and gain 2 mana. Lose 1 strength.

features.title: Rune Power (Gnome)
features.description: Gain 3 mana.

features.title: Percipience
features.description: Gain 1 intelligence.

features.title: Tool Making
features.description: Spend 1 hour making a tool or trap that can give advantage to an expertise check or can do up to 1d6 damage that ignores damage reduction.

features.title: Tinkerer
features.description: Each time you level up with class advancement, including the time you chose this feature, you may create one artisan item. Requires level 5.

features.title: Master Tinkerer
features.description: Each time you level up with class advancement, including the time you chose this feature, you may create one mastercrafted item. Requires level 9 and **Tinkerer**.

features.title: Tooth and claw
features.description: Make a skill vs. willpower melee attack. The attack does 1d4 damage + strength that ignores armor.

features.title: Ruthless
features.description: Use this heroic action after killing a creature. Make a charge attack without drawing opportunity.

features.title: Furious
features.description: Use this heroic action after killing a creature. Make an attack against an adjacent creature.

features.title: Determined
features.description: Gain block 1 while not equipped with a shield.

features.title: Outcast
features.description: Gain advantage when 4 or more spaces away from all allies.

features.title: Wisdom of the Clan
features.description: Intelligence attacks made against a creature that you already attacked this encounter gain advantage.

features.title: Power
features.description: Cast a spell and apply a single enhancement at no mana cost.

features.title: Quick Cast
features.description: When a new initiative card is drawn but before any creatures take an action, you may cast a spell.

features.title: Combat casting
features.description: You may wield a staff or wand one handed as a secondary weapon and cast spells even when having another weapon equipped as a primary weapon. Do not draw opportunity attacks when preparing and casting spells.

features.title: Warrior Casting
features.description: Cast spells even while you are not equipped with a staff or wand.

features.title: Armored Casting
features.description: Cast spells even while wearing medium armor.

features.title: Greater Armored Casting
features.description: Cast spells even while wearing heavy armor or a shield. Requires **Armored Casting**.

features.title: Spell practice
features.description: Acquire 2 mystic spells.

features.title: Source
features.description: Gain 3 mana.

features.title: Greater Source
features.description: Gain 3 mana. Requires **Source**.

features.title: Guild Apprentice
features.description: Acquire 1 mystic spell. You may spend 1 hour to make a roll on the mages guild table without being at the mage's guild.

features.title: Archmage
features.description: Acquire 1 mystic spell. You may modify the result of a mage's guild roll up or down by 3. Requires **Scholar** and intelligence 5+.

features.title: Unleashed Anger
features.description: Cast a spell and add 1 to your hex dice.

features.title: Controlled Tempest
features.description: When casting a spell, reduce the damage you take by half.

features.title: Arcane Greed
features.description: When casting a spell, you may reroll 1s on your hex dice.

features.title: Greater Hex
features.description: Increase your hex dice to 1d6. Requires level 5+.

features.title: Infernal Hex
features.description: Increase your hex dice to 1d8. Requires Greater Hex and level 13+.

features.title: Warlock Training
features.description: Acquire 1 mystic spell.

features.title: Back stab
features.description: Make an attack against a creature you are flanking and gain an extra weapon damage dice.

features.title: Quick Strike
features.description: Make an initiative vs. initiative attack.

features.title: Set Trap
features.description:
Place a marker in a space up to 3 spaces away and choose one of the below effects. If any creature moves into or out of the space with the marker or an adjacent space, make a skill vs. agility roll and remove the marker. If the attack hits, apply the chosen effect. You may use this ability outside of combat without counting the heroic action as being used.

**Poison dart**: 1d6 damage that ignores armor at the start of each round. If you roll a 5 or 6 for damage, the effect ends.

**Sticky slime**: The target cannot make major moves until they spend a major action and succeed on a strength vs. skill check against you.

**Arrow**: The target takes 2d6 damage.

features.title: Two weapon fighting
features.description: Attack with your secondary weapon. In order to use this feature, you must have two weapons equipped and both must be small.

features.title: Twin weapon fighting
features.description: Attack with your secondary weapon. In order to use this feature, you must have two weapons equipped and your off hand weapon must be small. Requires Two weapon fighting.

features.title: Weak Spot
features.description: If you are flanking an enemy creature, you may place a single d4 on this action. The number of d4s that can be on this feature at the same time is equal to your heroic actions per day limit. The next back stab heroic action you take against a creature, you may spend these d4 to add to your skill roll or damage roll. You can only use this ability against one creature at a time. Requires: Back stab

features.title: Trap Expert
features.description: Increase the damage of your traps by one damage dice and place two traps each time you take the action. Requires skill 5+.

features.title: Exploit
features.description: Gain +3 with advantage instead of +2

features.title: Dualist
features.description: Gain advantage with agility against melee attacks when neither you nor the attacker are adjacent to an ally

features.title: Orison
features.description: Any other character with a prepared spell may immediately apply the spell effect.

features.title: Inspiring Presence
features.description: Choose a character within line of sight. They may take a heroic action that does not count towards their limit of heroic actions per day.

features.title: Benevolence
features.description: Any ally within line of sight that is within melee range of an enemy may make a major move without drawing opportunity attacks. They must not end their movement adjacent to an enemy.

features.title: Vespers
features.description: Add d6 to the healing of any spell you cast that already heals.

features.title: Ex Nihilo
features.description: Add 4 to the range of all spells. Any spell that has a range of adjacent instead has a range of 4.

features.title: Force of Nature
features.description: Make a weapon attack. The damage is equal to your full strength (no damage dice) and ignores armor.

features.title: Winds of Nature
features.description: Cast a major spell and apply the effect immediately without waiting on the spell card.

features.title: Incarnation of Nature
features.description: Once per day, transform into an animal of your choice. While transformed, you have stats equal to the beast monster profile of your current level. If you are reduced to 0 health while transformed, you return to your normal body with 1 health remaining. You may return to your normal body with a major action. The next time the sun sets or rises, you return to your normal body regardless with whatever health you had before transforming. While transformed, you may not use any of your class features or cast spells.

features.title: Ally of the Forest
features.description: Gain 2 agility when in woods or forests.

features.title: Life of Nature
features.description: Gain 4 health.

features.title: Second wind
features.description: Gain temporary health equal to 1d6 + willpower. This replaces any temporary health that you already had.

features.title: Cleave
features.description: Make a melee attack action with a weapon and target two creatures that you are adjacent to and roll damage for whichever creature you hit. If your attack roll was higher than both defense rolls you may choose which of the two creatures, you hit.

features.title: Bull Rush
features.description: Charge a creature and gain an extra weapon dice of damage. You must start more than 4 spaces away from the target.

features.title: Shield Bash
features.description: If you are using a shield, make a willpower vs. willpower attack with damage equal to d6 + your strength.

features.title: Threaten
features.description: If an enemy creature was adjacent to you at any point during this turn and attacked an adjacent ally, you may attack that enemy creature.

features.title: Aim
features.description: After rolling damage you may choose to reroll any dice that rolled a 1. You cannot reroll dice after rolling for exploding damage.

features.title: Greater aim
features.description: After rolling damage you may choose to reroll any dice that rolled a 1 or a 2. The dice must be d6 or larger. You cannot reroll dice after rolling for exploding damage. Required aim.

features.title: Slam
features.description: You may jump 3 spaces without drawing an opportunity attack and make a melee attack with a two-handed weapon. While jumping, you may leap over any human sized creature. If the target is killed, any remaining damage can be applied to any creature adjacent to the target.

features.title: Flurry
features.description: Spend 1 fury dice and make two attacks, one with your primary weapon and one with your secondary weapon.

features.title: Rage
features.description: Gain a fury dice and attack with your secondary weapon.

features.title: Unleashed Pain
features.description: Increase the size of your fury dice to d6.

features.title: Great Strength
features.description: You may wield a two-handed weapon with one hand and a shield or other weapon in the other hand. Requires a strength of 6.

features.title: Titanic Strength
features.description: You may wield two two-handed weapons. On all heroic actions, attack with both weapons. Requires Great Strength and a strength of 8.

features.title: Inspiration
features.description: Choose an adjacent ally. They may make an attack.

features.title: Leadership (Cleric)
features.description: Choose an ally with more remaining health than you. They may take a heroic action that does not count towards their limit of heroic actions per day.

features.title: Sacrifice (Cleric)
features.description: Choose an adjacent ally. If your damage reduction is higher than theirs, they use your damage reduction. When they take damage, half of all the damage they take is applied to your character instead. This continues until you choose to end the effect or until a round ends where you and the target are not adjacent.

features.title: Direction
features.description: Make a minor movement and then choose an adjacent ally. They may also make a minor movement.

features.title: Turn Undead
features.description: When casting a spell apply all the healing as damage that ignores damage reduction. All the targets must be undead.

features.title: Greater Turn Undead
features.description: When using Turn Undead, reroll the lowest damage dice. Requires Turn Undead.

features.title: Arbitrate
features.description: Make a melee willpower vs. willpower attack that does 1d6 + willpower damage armor.

features.title: Sacrifice (Paladin)
features.description: Take damage that ignores armor equal to your willpower. Do the same amount of damage to up to three enemy creatures within 3 spaces.

features.title: Servitude
features.description: Take damage that ignores armor equal to your willpower. Heal the same amount of damage to up to 3 allies within 3 spaces.

features.title: Humble
features.description: Use this heroic action when being attacked. Do not roll a defense roll. You are automatically hit by the attack. Whatever damage you take, do the same damage to up to three enemy creatures within 3 spaces.

features.title: Holy Order
features.description: Acquire 2 divine spells and 2 mana.

features.title: Sacred Mastery
features.description: Acquire 2 divine spells and 2 mana. Requires **Holy Order**.

features.title: Divine Discipline
features.description: Gain 3 mana. Requires Holy Training.

features.title: Finish the Hunt
features.description: Make an initiative vs. initiative attack against your prey and add damage to the attack equal to the number of hunting points you have.

features.title: Ploy of the Ranger
features.description: Make an initiative vs. initiative attack against your prey and add to your attack roll equal to the number of hunting points you have.

features.title: Kill Shot
features.description: If you make an attack and kill your prey, make another attack against a new target.

features.title: Stalk the Prey
features.description: Increase your maximum hunting points equal to your initiative.

features.title: Ranger Resolve
features.description: Gain temporary health equal to your initiative + your current hunting points.

features.title: Animal Companion
features.description: Choose an animal companion: dog, wolf, mountain lion, panther, or an equivalent animal approved by your game master. Your pet has stats equal to a minion creature profile of your character level except that it always acts on initiative 1. If your pet ever dies, you may spend 1 week of dedicated in-game time acquiring a new pet of your choice from the below list. You and the game master can use this time to roleplay how you come about acquiring a new pet.

features.title: Claw and Arrow
features.description: Your animal companion gains damage against your prey equal to your hunting points. Requires Animal Companion.

features.title: Ranger Bond
features.description: Gain 1 hunting point when your animal companion attacks your prey. Requires Animal Companion.

features.title: Companions Fury
features.description: Your animal companion has stats equal to a soldier creature profile. It still activates on the initiative 1. Requires Animal Companion
